{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chaos Reverse Scale
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10702
|idx=60
|description="Deep within the heart of chaos lies a single indomitable scale. Untouchable. Unseeable…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=When receiving fatal damage, become immune to death, recover 8.6% of max HP, and activate Frenzy for 3 rounds. For each stack of Annihilation on enemies, your CRIT increases by 10%!
|hp=2348
|def=374
|atk=247
|rush=213
|gene1=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +8%
|gene2=In exploration, 8% chance to obtain 2x Reagents
|gene3=In explorations, 8% chance to gain 2x INTEL
|gene4=In explorations, 2x Time Chest Drops +8%
|gene5=In exploration, 8% chance to gain 2x Treasure Maps
|gene6=In exploration, 4% chance to obtain double Dragon Orbs
|gene7=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +8% (Awakened)
|}}
